name: Internal Hostels
description: Located inside DEDAN KIMATHI UNIVERSITY MAIN CAMPUS,It is the government policy that admissions into public universities should not pegged on available accommodation space. Of about 7000 students, the University can barely accommodate 152 ladies and 246 men, making the total available spaces to be 398. The Directorate of Students' Welfare (DSW)  is tasked with the allocation process.Allocation is based on students with special conditions such as medical, disability, physical challenges etc. are also considered

name: KIMATHI STUDENT CENTRE
description: Kimathi Student Centre has rooms with single bed, double deckers, two twin beds, three twin beds, four twin beds,and partitioned rooms for two beds.4,500 per person sharing & 9,000 Single Occupancy.

name: Grace Hostel
description: Fully furnished room (Kitchen with necessary cookingappliances and kitchen accessories, Living area, study table,chair, tv, a bed with a mattress and bedding.) and free Wifi.Kshs. 20,000 p.m,Refundable Deposit of Kshs.5,000,Kshs.1,300 per day
Nestled in a quiet suburban neighborhood, this hostel offers a peaceful study environment while still being accessible to campus.

description: Own compound, Fully furnished self-contained rooms. Shared Kitchen with necessary cooking appliances and kitchen accessories, Shared Living area with TV and fireplace, laundry services at a fee, WiFi. Other Amenities: Security Guards D & N, Full time Caretaker.

Fully furnished 1 bedroom house, Living area, fully furnished kitchen, Daily cleaning of the room, Linen is changed twice a week, Shared kitchen with a fridge, A sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi, Food delivery on request Secure location.
name: Rawin Homes

description: Own Compound - Seated on 1/2 Acre, Well Manicured Lawns. 2 Spacious Bedrooms. All Ensuite. 2 Full Baths, 1 Guest Washroom, 55" Smart TV with Netflix and Chromecast., High Speed WiFi, Living Area, Furnished Kitchen, Company Night Guard, Full-Time Caretaker, Chef Available on Request. Outside Hangout Area, Nyama Choma Grill, Fully equipped gym, Solar Heated Pool, Pet Friendly, Exterior security cameras.
name: Ace House
Tazama Place
description: Fully furnished two-bedroom apartment - Shared kitchen with a fridge - A common sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi - Electric kettles, cutlery and crockery are provided - Cleaning is done after every three days.
